glosses.ja: 緊張させる; いらだたせる

sentences.target: Ton chewing-gum me crispe au bureau.

translations.fr: Ton chewing-gum me crispe au bureau.
translations.en: Your chewing gum makes me tense at work.
translations.es: Tu chicle me pone de los nervios en el trabajo.
translations.de: Dein Kaugummikauen macht mich im Büro nervös.
translations.it: La tua gomma mi fa irrigidire in ufficio.
translations.ko: 회사에서 네가 껌 씹는 게 나를 긴장하게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在办公室嚼口香糖让我很紧张。
translations.yue: 你喺公司咬口香糖令我好唔自在。
translations.ru: Твоя жвачка на работе меня напрягает.
translations.pt: O seu chiclete me deixa nervoso no trabalho.
translations.vi: Kẹo cao su của bạn khiến tôi căng thẳng ở nơi làm việc.
translations.nl: Je kauwgom maakt me op het werk gespannen.
translations.uk: Твоя жуйка на роботі мене напружує.
translations.hu: A rágógumid feszültté tesz a munkahelyen.
translations.hi: दफ्तर में तुम्हारा च्यूइंग गम मुझे तनाव देता है.
translations.pl: Twoja guma do żucia w pracy mnie stresuje.
translations.el: Η τσίχλα σου στη δουλειά με αγχώνει.
translations.nb: Tyggegummien din gjør meg anspent på jobb.
translations.id: Permen karetmu membuatku tegang di kantor.
translations.sv: Ditt tuggummi gör mig spänd på jobbet.
translations.ro: Guma ta mă încordează la serviciu.
translations.cs: Tvoje žvýkačka mě v práci stresuje.
translations.da: Dit tyggegummi gør mig anspændt på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場であなたのガムが私を緊張させる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular); masculine singular agreeing with the head noun 'chewing-gum'; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Unstressed 1st person singular clitic object pronoun; here functions as the direct object (experiencer) of the verb 'crispe'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'Ton chewing-gum'; transitive, selecting the object clitic 'me'.
Preposition in contracted form (à + le); introduces the locative complement 'au bureau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au' (locative complement).

translations.en: I tense up at the wheel.
translations.vi: Tôi căng thẳng khi cầm lái.
translations.nl: Achter het stuur word ik gespannen.
translations.hi: गाड़ी चलाते समय मैं तनाव में आ जाता हूँ.
translations.ja: ハンドルを握ると緊張する。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Reflexive clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; coreferential with the subject, marking the pronominal verb 'se crisper'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; pronominal use with 'me' (je me crispe).
Preposition in contracted form (à + le); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the context 'at the wheel'.

sentences.target: Ses mails secs crispent toute l'équipe.

translations.fr: Ses mails secs crispent toute l'équipe.
translations.en: His curt emails make the whole team tense.
translations.es: Sus correos secos ponen nervioso a todo el equipo.
translations.de: Seine knappen E-Mails machen das ganze Team angespannt.
translations.it: Le sue email brusche mettono in tensione tutto il team.
translations.ko: 그의 무뚝뚝한 이메일은 팀 전체를 긴장하게 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他冷冰冰的邮件让整个团队紧张。
translations.yue: 佢啲生硬嘅電郵令成個團隊都好緊張。
translations.ru: Его сухие письма напрягают всю команду.
translations.pt: Os e-mails secos dele deixam a equipe inteira tensa.
translations.he: המיילים הלקוניים שלו מלחיצים את כל הצוות.
translations.tr: Onun kuru e-postaları tüm ekibi geriyor.
translations.vi: Những email khô khan của anh ấy khiến cả đội căng thẳng.
translations.ar: رسائله الإلكترونية الجافة تُوتر الفريق بأكمله.
translations.nl: Zijn droge e-mails maken het hele team gespannen.
translations.uk: Його сухі листи напружують всю команду.
translations.hu: A száraz e-mailjei az egész csapatot feszültté teszik.
translations.hi: उसके रूखे ईमेल पूरे टीम को तनाव में डाल देते हैं.
translations.pl: Jego oschłe maile stresują cały zespół.
translations.el: Τα κοφτά του μηνύματα αγχώνουν όλη την ομάδα.
translations.nb: De tørre e-postene hans gjør hele teamet anspent.
translations.id: Email dia yang kaku membuat seluruh tim tegang.
translations.sv: Hans torra mejl gör hela teamet spänt.
translations.ro: Emailurile lui seci încordează toată echipa.
translations.cs: Jeho strohé e-maily napínají celý tým.
translations.da: Hans tørre e-mails gør hele teamet anspændt.
translations.fi: Hänen tylyt sähköpostit saavat koko tiimin jännittymään.
translations.ja: 彼のぶっきらぼうなメールがチーム全体を緊張させる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular possessor) selecting a plural head noun; determiner of 'mails'.
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the subject NP.
Adjective, masculine plural; attributive modifier of 'mails', agreeing in number and gender.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with the plural subject 'Ses mails secs'; transitive.
Quantifying determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'équipe' to mean 'the whole team'.
Elided definite article before a vowel; here corresponds to 'la' with feminine noun 'équipe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'crispent'.

translations.es: Otra vez estás tensando los hombros.
translations.de: Du spannst schon wieder die Schultern an.
translations.it: Stai di nuovo irrigidendo le spalle.
translations.pt: Você está enrijecendo os ombros de novo.
translations.nl: Je spant je schouders weer aan.
translations.hi: तुम फिर से कंधे कड़े कर रहे हो.
translations.ja: また肩に力が入っているよ.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, with 'les épaules' as its direct object.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating repetition/continuation.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'épaules'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'crispes'.
